tweets.author: reneil1337
tweets.text:
Great card 🤘

Little boy serves Ministral3 Instruct 8b 32k + Qwen3 VL Embedding 2b (top left) allowing the RTX2000 to handle TTS+STT (below that)

The tinybox serves Qwen3.5 122b: 128k context, 2x concurrency on 4x4090 + Cydonia: 24b 65k context, 2x concurrency on 2x4090 (right) https://t.co/K73cosLuit

tweets.author: reneil1337
tweets.text:
Mind blown: Just installed a RTX 4000 Pro SFF via Oculink (m2 adapter) to my Lattepanda Sigma board which is my homelab @coolifyio server

How? Connected via SSH and told my main gpu cluster per opencode to setup the new GPU. It did the entire setup within 10 mins, 100% local 🤘 https://t.co/ASKf2FcoZE

tweets.author: OVRtheReality
tweets.text:
We just reached a new all-time high in weekly mappings, with +6,532 new locations mapped in a single week, a +402% increase vs our weekly average. 📈

In just 7 days, the OVER 3D Mapping Database grew from 186,808 to 193,340 3D mapped locations.

This acceleration is being driven https://t.co/5jtTy1a34S
